creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 166278
svn diff to fix www/cgichk (patch)

Let's ease the pressure on distcache, shall we? :)

CHANGES

MASTER_SITES
DISTFILE - rename, in order to conform to port framework
(adds) LICENSE
MAINTAINER
distinfo - update to reflect DISTFILE change

Proof it works... :)

# make -DBATCH extract

That's it!

Thank you!

--Chris
